title: Consume Animations
description: Adds eating animations for food and consumables
body:
# Showcase
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZqFtYQat/images/0879d9f07d1a93a549f47b7924abc9748a53278c.gif)

**All textures in this resourcepack are not mine!** The textures have been taken from the [Eating Animation mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)
